## Dataset

This project uses the ESA Collision Avoidance Challenge dataset.

**Download the raw dataset from Kaggle:**
https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/shadmanrohan/collisionavoidancechallenge

After downloading place the files here:
- `data/raw/train_data.csv`
- `data/raw/test_data.csv`

**Processed data** is generated by running `notebooks/01_eda.ipynb` 
which cleans the raw dataset and saves the result to `data/processed/`.
